mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iam_role (id, tenant_id, role_code, role_name, role_type, status, data_scope, created_at, updated_at, version, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{roleType}, #{status}, #{dataScope}, NOW(6), NOW(6), #{version}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_role SET role_code = #{role.roleCode}, role_name = #{role.roleName}, role_type = #{role.roleType}, status = #{role.status}, data_scope = #{role.dataScope}, updated_at = NOW(6), version = version + 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{role.tenantId} AND id = #{role.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND deleted = 0
